reviews.review_msg: Joao is one of the best profs I have had in 5 years of university. He is extremely knowledgeable, understanding, helpful, challenging and easy to approach. He takes a more informal role in his teaching and fosters a feeling of equality between everyone in the class. If you are interested in RJ and have an opportunity, take his class.

Great Prof, i wish more teachers would embrace a more hands on teaching style like this; with talking circles, guest speakers, open-topic papers, negotiable terms and field trips!! definitely recommend 315, 442 or any special topics courses with her for sure!
